checks.video_length_55_to_65_seconds: pass: final exported duration is 64.5 seconds
checks.theme_relevance: pass: scenes explicitly identify NUTN CSIE and computer science learning
checks.multi_agent_workflow: pass: Planner, Script, Visual, Reviewer, and Finalizer roles are separated
checks.handoff_traceability: pass: each agent output is stored as JSON and can be traced to storyboard scenes
checks.truthfulness: pass: wording avoids rankings, admission scores, employment rates, unverified lab names, and specific equipment claims
checks.copyright: pass with condition: self-shot/self-edited footage is acceptable; any added music, icons, photos, templates, or fonts must be self-made, editor-provided royalty-free assets, or openly licensed and documented
checks.portrait_rights: pass with condition: identifiable people in self-shot footage must give permission
checks.privacy: pass with condition: screens must be checked for private accounts, passwords, API keys, chat windows, student IDs, and grades
checks.zero_paid_token: pass: workflow can be completed using Hermes mock/stub outputs, phone shooting, local editing, and subtitles

scene_review.risk: Computer screen may reveal private data.
scene_review.required_fix: Use mock code or crop/blur screen content before export.

scene_review.risk: Campus or department signage may include logos or bystanders.
scene_review.required_fix: Use text title overlay instead of unauthorized logo; avoid or blur bystanders.

scene_review.risk: Learning-field claims could become too broad or exaggerated.
scene_review.required_fix: Keep wording to general fields such as programming, data, AI, systems, and network applications.

scene_review.risk: Group discussion footage includes identifiable people.
scene_review.required_fix: Confirm consent or shoot hands, backs, and screen details only.

scene_review.risk: Debug/terminal screen may contain usernames, file paths, or tokens.
scene_review.required_fix: Use a clean test project or crop sensitive areas.

scene_review.risk: Final call-to-action may include an incorrect URL or unauthorized official mark.
scene_review.required_fix: Use department name text only unless URL/logo is verified.

shooting_safety_checklist: Ask permission before filming identifiable people.
Avoid student IDs, grades, private chat windows, account names, passwords, and API keys.
Do not use copyrighted music unless license is documented.
Do not use school or department logos unless permission is confirmed.
Record source and permission notes in outputs/asset_sources.md.
revision_requests: After replacing the generated video with self-edited footage, update outputs/asset_sources.md.
Keep the final export path as outputs/final_video.mp4 so README and report remain consistent.
Run a final duration check and keep the exported video between 55 and 65 seconds.
